author: @tylerjennings8242
text:
Some of the Landman cast absolutely deserve awards. Billy Bob and Ali Larter deserve some recognition for sure. Ali Larter steals every scene she’s in on the show. She’s come a long way since being that girl from Varsity Blues and the first two Final Destination films.

What I like about Taylor is that he makes strong female characters who are flawed, unlike the rest of Hollywood. That’s one thing that I’ve really noticed from his shows. He consistently creates strong, yet flawed female characters that you want to back. When the rest of Hollywood gives us a strong female character, we end up rolling our eyes at them because they’re presented as perfect.

author: @kalkella8822
text: He has just as many liberal views as he does conservative views. Everybody who went gaga for episode 9 of Landman clearly didn't watch episode 10. The academy nominated Sheridan for his work that deserved to be nominated. Sicario, Wind River, and Hell or High Water either won something or were nominated. His shows are formulaic cookie cutter style and are clearly crafted by a writer's room. The quality of all of his shows has gone off a cliff. He just gave us 9 episodes of landman with 1 episode worth of development in them and a pretty good series finale. Tulsa King although entertaining is a villain of the week show basically (and clearly written by Stallone), the Lioness is just Zoe Saldana on a power trip yelling at military men twice her size, and Yellowstone is just his argument for giving land back to the natives. Mayor of Kingstown is the only gem left. The guy is quickly becoming a hack. I love how all of this is forgiven because he temporarily made fun of a trans person in 1 episode of landman that was undone one episode later.
